DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_MATERIAL]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_MATERIAL]
( 
	[MaterialID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobCostCategoryID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Material] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[UnitOfMeasure] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Cost] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[ListPrice] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_MaterialID] [int]  NULL,	
	[LP_JobCostCategoryID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL

)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
